workout.finisher: Incline walk · 10 min · 3.4 mph · 6-8% incline (skip if session hits 65 min)

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.note: Up from 345. Controlled tempo, don't lock out at top.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust Machine
exercises.note: Up from 145. Full hip extension, hard squeeze at top. No hyperextension.

exercises.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.note: Up from 35 lb. Hinge from hips, soft knee bend. If anything feels off, drop back to 35.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.note: Cap at 10 reps on last set if hamstrings are tight.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat (KB)
exercises.note: Drive through heels, elbows inside knees at the bottom.

exercises.name: Core Circuit D
exercises.detail: Plank shoulder tap x 10/side + Dead bugs x 8/side + Pallof press 40 lb x 10/side - 2 rounds
exercises.note: Anti-rotation focus. Keep hips square on taps. Lower back flat on dead bugs.
